title: Representative Offices in Vietnam: 5 Key Legal Exemptions for Businesses to Keep in Mind
metaDescription: A webinar on the key legal exemptions and obligations when setting up and running a representative office in Vietnam.
about: A representative office is the most popular model for market entry in Vietnam. As an affordable solution for newcomers to familiarize themselves with the Vietnamese market, setting up a representative office can be a preliminary step before fully committing to commercial activities and expansion.

details.label: Format
details.value: Online webinar — joining link provided upon registration

bulletSections.heading: What We'll Cover
items: Definitions and benefits of a representative office
Legal requirements for registering a representative office
Steps required to register a representative office
Conditions to be appointed as head of a representative office
Advantages and disadvantages compared to other business entities

registration.heading: Save Your Seat
registration.subtitle: Tune in to our exclusive webinar for the latest updates.
